items.description: Represents a single event instance that occurred in the system

id.description: Unique identifier for the event instance

eventType.description: The type of event that occurred

objectId.description: The ID of the CRM object associated with this event

objectType.description: The type of CRM object (e.g., contact, company, deal)

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred

properties.description: Additional properties associated with the event

paging.description: Pagination information for navigating result sets

next.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results

after.description: Cursor token for the next page

link.description: API link to the next page of results

prev.description: Pagination cursor for retrieving the previous page of results

before.description: Cursor token for the previous page

link.description: API link to the previous page of results
